title: Erodium valentinum
taxonomy: Erodium valentinum belongs to the family Geraniaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the geranium family. Within this family, Erodium valentinum is classified as a species of the genus Erodium, a group of plants often referred to as the herons' bill or Stork's bill. The genus Erodium is further divided into several species, with Erodium valentinum being one of them. The classification of Erodium valentinum is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Geraniales, Family: Geraniaceae, Genus: Erodium, Species: E. valentinum. This classification helps to identify and differentiate Erodium valentinum from other plant species.
